calendarFaqs.q: How can I add Houston Independent School District's school calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: To add the Houston Independent School District 2025-2026 calendar to Google Calendar, download the .ics file from this page, then open Google Calendar, go to Settings → Import & Export → Import, and upload the file. All school holidays, breaks, and key dates will appear on your calendar automatically.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Houston Independent School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Houston Independent School District is Tuesday, August 12, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Houston Independent School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Houston Independent School District is Thursday, June 4, 2026. The school year runs from August through June, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Houston Independent School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Houston Independent School District runs Mar 9, 2026–Mar 13, 2026, 5 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for Houston Independent School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Houston Independent School District runs Dec 22, 2025–Jan 2, 2026, 12 days. School resumes Jan 6, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: How long is Thanksgiving break for Houston Independent School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for Houston Independent School District runs Nov 24, 2025–Nov 28, 2025, 5 days.

calendarFaqs.q: How many teacher work days does Houston Independent School District have in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Houston Independent School District has 192 teacher work days in 2025-2026. This includes all 180 student instructional days plus 12 additional days for planning, professional development, and pre- and post-school year activities. Based on the official Houston Independent School District teacher work calendar.

yearNumbers.label: Ends in June
yearNumbers.detail: Houston ISD's school year extends into June — one of the very few major Texas districts whose last day falls in June rather than May.

yearNumbers.label: Chavez-Huerta Day
yearNumbers.detail: Cesar Chavez-Dolores Huerta Day is observed as a school holiday — a distinct cultural observance not found on most Texas district calendars.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday
yearNumbers.detail: Good Friday is observed as a school holiday, giving families a long Easter weekend.

calendarNotes: Houston ISD begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 12, 2025 — among the earliest starts of any major US urban district. Spring Break runs March 9–13, 2026, one of the earlier spring break windows in Texas. The school year ends June 4, 2026.
